overview: A heartfelt prayer song asking God to guard us with compassion, grant light and youthful joy, and keep hope alive in difficult times.

lyrics.hebrew: הוא היושב לו אי שם במרומים
lyrics.transliteration: Hu hayoshev lo ei sham bameromim
lyrics.english: He who dwells somewhere up in the heavens
He is the healer of all who are ill
He gives abundant joy to children
He is the One who brings justice
He is in heaven, and He is the only One
He is great and awe-inspiring
He is the One who guards us from distress

lyrics.hebrew: אלוה, שמור נא עלינו כמו ילדים
lyrics.transliteration: Eloha, shmor na aleinu kmo yeladim
lyrics.english: God, please guard us like children
Please protect us and do not leave us
Give us light and the joy of youth
Give us strength again and again
Please guard us like children
Please protect us and do not leave us
Give us light and the joy of youth
Give us the ability to love as well

lyrics.hebrew: מה כבר נותר לנו עוד בימים
lyrics.transliteration: Ma kvar notar lanu od bayamim
lyrics.english: What truly remains for us in these days
What truly remains throughout the day
A sun of hope and countless gazes
A night and a day of dream
He is in heaven, and He is the only One
He is great and awe-inspiring
He is the One who guards us from distress

lyrics.hebrew: אלוה, שמור נא עלינו כמו ילדים...
lyrics.transliteration: Eloha, shmor na aleinu kmo yeladim...
lyrics.english: God, please guard us like children...
